title: Wild, Wild Susan
writer: Steuart M. Emery, Thomas J. Geraghty
actors: Bebe Daniels, Rod La Rocque, Henry Stephenson
plot: Wealthy New York girl, Susan Van Dusen, in search of thrills and laughter, leaves home and finds work with a private detective agency. She meets Tod Waterbury, who, under another name, is working as a cab driver (in search of stor...
